name: Minestrone
recipeIngredient: 1 cup White beans, dried and soaked
3/4 cup Green beans, trimmed and cut
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy-bottomed soup pot, heat olive oil.
2. Add garlic, onion, leeks, carrots, and cabbage. Sauté, stirring over medium heat for about 10 minutes.
3. Add the pre-soaked beans, potatoes, tomatoes, tomato paste, water/stock, celery seed, Parmesan rind, bay leaf, oregano, thyme, and basil. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 2 hours, or until beans are tender. Remove the Parmesan rind and bay leaf.
5. Add zucchini, green beans, peas, and spaghetti. Cook another 15 minutes, adjusting seasonings as needed.
6. Stir in parsley and fresh basil. Serve hot, topping each bowl with a generous amount of freshly grated Parmesan. This freezes well.
